strengths: ~20 years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure satisfies the minimum tenure requirement
Current role includes hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP (Model Context Protocol) tooling, showing active engagement with agentic workflows
Demonstrated entrepreneurial and open-source track record: founded GISCollective, authored D-language testing libraries, and delivered public workshops and conference talks
concerns: Titles throughout career are Senior/Staff Engineer with no evidence of operating at director-level IC scope, strategic customer advisory, or cross-organizational influence at scale
AI expertise is entirely nascent — limited to one role started April 2025 — with no recognized products, publications, or platforms establishing credibility as an AI thought leader
No advanced degree in AI or ML, and cloud experience is shallow (AWS CDK cited in one role), well below the preferred Master's/PhD and deep cloud-platform fluency the role calls out
response.justification: Bogdan is a capable, broad-spectrum engineer with genuine entrepreneurial instincts and an emerging foothold in AI tooling, but this role is explicitly director-level and requires recognized, demonstrated AI expertise along with a track record of advising strategic customers on cloud and AI strategy. His entire career history sits at Senior/Staff individual contributor level with no signal of operating at organizational altitude — influencing product direction, advising enterprise customers, or shaping AI platform strategy. His AI work is real but confined to a single role begun fourteen months ago, which does not constitute the established body of AI-powered products the job description explicitly requires. The seniority and depth gaps are too material for this to be a competitive application.
